seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Corunnun and Cosgrove South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Corunnun vs Cosgrove South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Corunnun and Cosgrove South.
heading: Corunnun vs Cosgrove South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Corunnun, Victoria and Cosgrove South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cosgrove South has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Corunnun (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Corunnun or Cosgrove South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Corunnun has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Cosgrove South scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Corunnun scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Cosgrove South scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Corunnun or Cosgrove South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cosgrove South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
